subject: Re: Fwd: Wood Entry bulkheads
body_html:
ok


----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, February 2, 2007 3:02:05 PM
Subject: Fw: Fwd: Wood Entry bulkheads




-----Forwarded Message-----
From: jetcare@aol.com
Sent: Feb 2, 2007 12:22 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: lvjet@aol.com
Subject: Fwd: Wood Entry bulkheads

Sarah plz forward this info to JE, they are requesting a two day slip from the 14th to the 16th.  Also we need to know for sure that he does not want to paint the plane at this time,,please confirm this.
Regards,
Larry 
 
 
-----Original Message-----
From: jmassar@intljet.com
To: JETCARE@aol.com; eroth@intljet.com
Cc: cconquest@intljet.com
Sent: Fri, 2 Feb 2007 8:40 AM
Subject: RE: Wood Entry bulkheads

Dear Larry,
           
            I just wanted to follow up our conversation this morning.
            The veneer has been ordered for the entry bulkheads but unfortunately the quickest I can get it is 2/9/07. As we discussed that will not allow us enough time to apply the veneer, stain, tint the panel to match and get the required 3 coats of clear for a proper finished product. That is why I have requested an extension of two days to delivery date. This will put the out date to Friday, 2/16.      
            To answer you hydrolock question, I have personally inspected all single seats and the double seats to check the quoted amount and found that all seat do have two (2) hydrolocks each. The total is 16.
            Please contact me with any questions / concerns.
 
Thank you,
 
Jay Massar
Operations Manager
International Jet Interiors
631 737 5900
 
From: JETCARE@aol.com [mailto:JETCARE@aol.com]
Sent: Thursday, February 01, 2007 4:59 PM
To: eroth@intljet.com
Cc: jmassar@intljet.com; cconquest@intljet.com
Subject: Wood Entry bulkheads
 
JE has approved the entryway wood bulkhead AWO.  I will sign and fax.  Please advise us of the status of the replacement wood.
Larry
